blocks.text: Arsenal's Title Test: London Derby Headlines a Norwegian Winter Sports Bonanza

Arsenal lead the Premier League at 61 points but face Chelsea's dangerous attack at the Emirates at 17:30. Meanwhile, Kristoffersen and Haugan contest the alpine slalom final in Soldeu, and Norway's biathlon relay teams race in Kontiolahti.
⚽ Chelsea at Arsenal — table-topping Arsenal host Chelsea in a title-defining London derby
⚽ Sevilla at Real Betis — one of Europe's most ferocious city derbies, atmosphere guaranteed
